name: training_session_04

input.subject: [Required] Annual Compliance Training - Your Session
input.snippet: You have been enrolled in the annual compliance training...
input.body_text:
COMPANY LEARNING & DEVELOPMENT

══════════════════════════════════════
REQUIRED TRAINING ENROLLMENT
══════════════════════════════════════

Hello,

You have been enrolled in the Annual Compliance Training for 2026.

This training is MANDATORY for all employees and must be completed by March 31, 2026.

──────────────────────────────────────
YOUR SESSION
──────────────────────────────────────

Session: Annual Compliance Training
Date: Wednesday, February 25, 2026
Time: 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM
Location: Training Room A (Building 2, Floor 1)

Virtual Option: Zoom link below
https://company.zoom.us/j/compliance2026
Passcode: comply26

──────────────────────────────────────
AGENDA
──────────────────────────────────────
• Code of Conduct Review
• Data Privacy & Security
• Anti-Harassment Policy
• Ethics & Reporting
• Quiz & Certification

──────────────────────────────────────

Please add this to your calendar. If you cannot attend this session, you must reschedule by contacting learning@company.com.

Non-completion may affect your performance review.

Thank you,
Learning & Development Team

notes: Mandatory corporate training with hybrid options
